chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1661 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 10.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahid Ali Jogi, Advocate for the respondent No.6 & 7. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In compliance of order dated 03.09.2025, counsel for respondent No.6 & 7 has filed his statement along with two original cheques bearing No. 54482827 amounting to Rs.1,19,409 (one lac nineteen thousand four hundred nine) dated 10.10.2025 and cheque No.54366822, amounting to Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousands), dated 10.09.2025 of Sindh Bank Limited, Thari Mirwah, District Khairpur, in the name of Ghulam Sarwar/ petitioner. Said cheques have been provided to the petitioner and counsel for the petitioner is present along with petitioner has also confirmed the contents and stated that total amount has been paid. Hence, in the circumstances, instant petitions become infructuous same is hereby disposed of as infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
